label: Steel — Korea (PLANiT MACC)
description: 16 BF/EAF facilities; fuel + feedstock blend groups; transitions to H2-DRI-ESF / EAF under a declining CO2 target and rising carbon price.

label: Shipping — fleet fuel mix
description: Fleet aggregated by engine class; fuel blend (bio / LNG / e-fuels) shifts within share bounds under a tightening well-to-wake CO2 target.

label: Petrochemicals — Korea (PLANiT MACC)
description: Process archetypes (Naphtha Cracker / BTX / Utility); naphtha crackers may switch to H2 or electric cracking under a Policy_Target CO2 path.

label: Aluminium — 3-stage chain
description: Refinery → smelter → caster (3 routed stages); each stage has a lower-carbon transition (H2 refining / RE smelting / electric casting) under a rising carbon price and declining CO2 cap.

label: Value chain — CCGT power + steel (KR)
description: A value chain (built as a node hierarchy): a Power company owning a CCGT (a GROUP of GT + ST wired by steam) AND a Solar farm (a single component) at the same level, supplying electricity to a Steel company's integrated mill. Open in the Value Chain tab; solves jointly (system) optimally.
